STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY ONG, KANGHUI JERIEL BIKELINK/ELOCK TECHNOLOGIES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-08-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM PANT LY. PLAINTIFF KANGHUI JERIEL ONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BIKELINK / ELOCK TECHNOLOGIES IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEVEN GROVER NIENSTEDT, OWNER, CEO AND JACOB MASSLER, SENIOR SALES, PARTNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ONG, KANGHUI JERIEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BIKELINK/ELOCK TECHNOLOGIES ALTHOUGH BETTER SIGNAGE TO EMPHASIZE CUSTOMER'S RESPONSIBILITY FOR ANY LOSS, THEFT OR DAMAGE, USER AGREEMENT WAS CLEAR IN SETTING RESPONSIBILITY OF SUCH TO THE CUSTOMER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) STEVEN GROVER NEINSTEDT, OWNER/CEO FILED BY DEFENDANT BIKELINK/ELOCK TECHNOLOGIES
